class_pack_plans.name: 5-Ride Beginner Intro Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Perfect for new riders to try out the studio with five beginner-friendly classes.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Non-refundable, valid for 21 days from purchase, beginner and all-level classes only.

class_pack_plans.name: 5-Ride Standard Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Flexible 5-ride pack usable at any time of day.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Valid for 30 days from purchase. You may use rides to book seats for guests.

class_pack_plans.name: 8-Ride Morning Commuter Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Discounted rides for weekday morning classes before 11:00 am.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Valid for weekday morning classes only. Expires 45 days after purchase.

class_pack_plans.name: 10-Ride Student Saver Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Discounted 10-ride pack for students with valid ID.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Must present valid student ID at first visit. Rides expire 60 days after purchase.

class_pack_plans.name: 10-Ride Weekday Saver Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Best value pack for weekday rides, valid until 5:00 pm and after 8:00 pm.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Valid for weekday classes, excluding 5–8 pm prime time. Expires 60 days from purchase.

class_pack_plans.name: 10-Ride Anytime Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Flexible 10-pack valid for any class, any time, any studio.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Valid for 90 days from purchase at all active studio locations.

class_pack_plans.name: 12-Ride City Commuter Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Ideal for regular riders who visit the studio 2–3 times per week.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Non-transferable, valid for 90 days, can be used to reserve seats for guests.

class_pack_plans.name: 15-Ride All Access Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Shareable 15-ride pack for friends and family.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Up to 3 seats per class may be booked from this pack. Valid for 120 days.

class_pack_plans.name: 20-Ride Premium Anytime Pack
class_pack_plans.description: High-value pack for dedicated riders, valid for all classes and studios.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Up to 4 riders per class may be booked using this pack. Expires 6 months from purchase.

class_pack_plans.name: 3-Ride New Rider Trial
class_pack_plans.description: Low-commitment trial pack for brand new riders.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: Available to first-time riders only. Expires 14 days after first use.

class_pack_plans.name: 25-Ride Corporate Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Bulk ride pack intended for teams and corporate wellness programs.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: May be shared across team members. Requires corporate account setup.

class_pack_plans.name: 10-Ride Legacy Pack
class_pack_plans.description: Legacy pricing pack no longer sold but honored for existing customers.
class_pack_plans.terms_summary: No longer available for purchase. Existing balances remain valid until expiration.

guest_pass_plans.name: Single Guest Ride Pass
guest_pass_plans.description: Admit one guest rider to any standard class.
guest_pass_plans.terms_summary: Valid for one guest seat in a single class within 30 days of purchase.

guest_pass_plans.name: Weekend Guest Duo Pass
guest_pass_plans.description: Bring up to two guests to any Saturday or Sunday class.
guest_pass_plans.terms_summary: May be applied to weekend classes only. Both guest seats must be used in the same class.

guest_pass_plans.name: Day Guest Pass (Unlimited)
guest_pass_plans.description: Covers unlimited guest seats for one calendar day at a single studio.
guest_pass_plans.terms_summary: Valid only on the selected date and studio. Up to 4 guest seats per class.

guest_pass_plans.name: Legacy Guest Pass
guest_pass_plans.description: Older guest pass product honored for existing customers only.
guest_pass_plans.terms_summary: Not available for new purchase. Existing passes remain valid until expiration.

membership_plans.name: 7-Day Unlimited Trial
membership_plans.description: One-time introductory week of unlimited rides at a single studio.
membership_plans.terms_summary: One-time purchase per rider. Unlimited rides for 7 consecutive days at the Flatiron studio.

membership_plans.name: Monthly Unlimited (Single Studio)
membership_plans.description: Unlimited rides for 30 days at your home studio.
membership_plans.terms_summary: Renews every 30 days until canceled. Unlimited rides at the Flatiron studio only.

membership_plans.name: Monthly Unlimited All-Access
membership_plans.description: Unlimited rides for 30 days at all studio locations.
membership_plans.terms_summary: Renews every 30 days until canceled. Includes all current studio locations.

membership_plans.name: 90-Day Unlimited All-Access
membership_plans.description: Best for committed riders who want flexibility across all studios.
membership_plans.terms_summary: One-time payment for 90 days of unlimited rides at all studio locations.

membership_plans.name: 8 Rides / Month Membership
membership_plans.description: Up to 8 rides every 30 days at your selected studio.
membership_plans.terms_summary: Renews every 30 days. Unused rides do not carry over.

membership_plans.name: 4 Weekday Rides / Month
membership_plans.description: Budget-friendly membership for riders who attend once per week on weekdays.
membership_plans.terms_summary: Valid for weekday classes only at the Williamsburg studio. Renews monthly.

membership_plans.name: 12 Rides / 30 Days Multi-Studio
membership_plans.description: Flexible limited membership usable at multiple studio locations.
membership_plans.terms_summary: Renews every 30 days. Up to 12 rides, shareable across included studios.

membership_plans.name: Monthly Unlimited Off-Peak
membership_plans.description: Unlimited rides for 30 days during off-peak hours only.
membership_plans.terms_summary: Legacy plan not available for new sign-ups. Existing members may keep current pricing.

membership_plans.name: Annual Unlimited All-Access
membership_plans.description: Unlimited rides for 12 months at all studios with priority booking.
membership_plans.terms_summary: One-time payment, does not auto-renew. Unlimited rides and priority waitlist access for 12 months.

studios.name: Flatiron Studio
studios.description: Flagship indoor cycling studio in the heart of Manhattan’s Flatiron district.

studios.name: Chelsea Studio
studios.description: Modern cycling space with stadium-style seating and enhanced sound system.

studios.name: Williamsburg Studio
studios.description: Brooklyn location with a relaxed vibe and large lounge area.

studios.name: Astoria Studio
studios.description: Queens studio with natural light and expanded beginner class schedule.

instructors.name: Amelia Park
instructors.bio: Amelia blends rhythm-based rides with approachable coaching, focusing on proper form and building confidence for new and returning riders.

instructors.name: Marcus Lee
instructors.bio: Marcus is known for high-intensity interval training rides with big climbs and big playlists to match.

instructors.name: Sophia Ramos
instructors.bio: Sophia’s morning classes focus on endurance and mindset, perfect for riders looking to build a consistent routine.

instructors.name: Daniel Cole
instructors.bio: Daniel specializes in technique-focused beginner rides and low-impact classes that are joint-friendly.

instructors.name: Zoe Kim
instructors.bio: Zoe’s themed rides and throwback playlists make every class feel like a party on the bike.

instructors.name: Jackson Reid
instructors.bio: Jackson brings an athlete’s mindset to every ride, focusing on performance metrics and progressive training blocks.

instructors.name: Rachel Green
instructors.bio: Rachel is a rider-favorite coach for early morning and lunchtime express classes with efficient, upbeat workouts.

instructors.name: Luca Martin
instructors.bio: Luca’s weekend rides combine long endurance sections with mindful recovery and breathwork.

instructors.name: Nina Patel
instructors.bio: Nina is known for her supportive coaching style, making her classes ideal for both beginners and riders returning from injury.

instructors.name: Oliver Chen
instructors.bio: Oliver’s evening power rides are designed to help you push past plateaus with structured intervals.

instructors.name: Emma Ross
instructors.bio: Emma teaches music-forward rhythm rides that are challenging but accessible, with clear cues for all levels.

instructors.name: Tariq Hassan
instructors.bio: Tariq is a cross-training specialist who blends cycling with core and strength segments for a full-body workout.

Seasonal $50 off select membership purchases over $400.
15% off class packs of 10 rides or more.

class_sessions.name: Weekend Endurance Ride with Luca
class_sessions.description: Longer-format weekend endurance ride focusing on steady climbs and controlled pushes, ideal for building aerobic capacity.

class_sessions.name: Morning All-Levels Ride with Rachel
class_sessions.description: Balanced all-levels morning ride that combines intervals and light climbs to jump-start your day.

class_sessions.name: Evening Power Ride with Oliver
class_sessions.description: High-intensity power ride featuring structured intervals and heavy climbs, perfect for experienced riders.

class_sessions.name: Sunday Express Ride with Emma
class_sessions.description: Fast-paced 30-minute express class with quick intervals and a music-driven flow.

class_sessions.name: Beginner Foundations with Nina
class_sessions.description: Gentle, technique-focused beginner ride that covers bike setup, form, and basic rhythm riding.

class_sessions.name: Sunrise All-Levels Ride with Rachel
class_sessions.description: Sunrise ride that blends climbs, sprints, and recovery tracks, suitable for most fitness levels.

class_sessions.name: Evening HIIT Climb with Marcus
class_sessions.description: High-intensity interval training ride with powerful climbs and short recoveries for a serious challenge.

class_sessions.name: Williamsburg Morning Ride with Sophia
class_sessions.description: Steady-state morning ride with tempo efforts and smooth transitions, great for building consistency.

class_sessions.name: Beginner Evening Ride with Amelia
class_sessions.description: Supportive beginner-focused evening class that introduces resistance changes, hand positions, and basic choreography.

class_sessions.name: Friday Night Rhythm Ride with Zoe
class_sessions.description: Music-driven evening ride with fun choreography and moderate intensity, perfect as a lower-priced alternative to prime-time classes.

class_sessions.name: Weekend Endurance with Sophia
class_sessions.description: Longer endurance blocks with controlled resistance, ideal for building stamina over the weekend.

class_sessions.name: Saturday All-Levels Ride with Amelia
class_sessions.description: Mid-morning weekend ride with scalable efforts and options for both newer and experienced riders.

class_sessions.name: Saturday Beginner Ride with Amelia
class_sessions.description: Second Saturday session with extra coaching time, ideal for new riders or those returning to the bike.

class_sessions.name: Sunday Afternoon Express with Rachel
class_sessions.description: Compact 30-minute afternoon express ride with Rachel, focused on efficient intervals and upbeat playlists.

class_sessions.name: Sunday Beginner Ride with Nina
class_sessions.description: Supportive beginner-friendly Sunday afternoon class with extra form cues and longer recoveries.

class_sessions.name: Next Week Sunrise Ride with Rachel
class_sessions.description: Early-morning ride kicking off your week with progressive intervals and coach-led motivation.

class_sessions.name: After-Work Power Ride with Oliver
class_sessions.description: Post-work power session featuring heavy resistance tracks and performance-focused intervals.

class_sessions.name: Themed Rhythm Ride with Zoe
class_sessions.description: High-energy themed ride with choreography synced to the beat, suitable for most experience levels.

class_sessions.name: Low-Impact Morning Ride with Daniel
class_sessions.description: Joint-friendly low-impact ride focused on smooth pedal strokes, lighter resistance, and technique.
